data.current_summary: Cancel SMS that is buffered for SIM card and not yet delivered
data.current_description: Cancel SMS that is buffered for SIM card and not yet delivered
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a buffered SMS message that has not yet been delivered to the specified SIM card. Requires both ICCID and SMS message ID. Only SMS in pending/queued state can be cancelled; already-delivered messages cannot be cancelled. Returns confirmation of cancellation or an error if the message cannot be cancelled. This operation is useful for preventing unwanted messages from being sent.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions the buffered state but lacks clarity about what happens on success/failure and when cancellation is possible. Enhanced version clarifies the preconditions (message must be pending), the response behavior, and the practical use case for AI agents to understand when this operation is applicable.

data.current_summary: Get current status of SIM
data.current_description: Get current status of SIM
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current operational status of the specified SIM card identified by ICCID. Returns a SIM card object containing status information including connectivity state, activation status, and other relevant SIM properties. Use this to monitor SIM health, verify active status, and check connectivity before performing operations like sending SMS or data transfers.
